ab: Makua ca diqanin haip?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Pimadai’i quu ca manami’ a danum, maupa’i macis’it tukuc ca diqanin.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Makua ca diqanin haip?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Pimadai’i quu ca danum, maupa’i macaklu tukuc ca diqanin.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Makua ca diqanin han nata’?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Vali’an sala, aka’a tu minpungul tamuhungan.
ch: B:太陽很大，記得帶帽子防曬。
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Makua ca diqanin han nata’?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Luhuman sala, uka sadu’an i vali’ han diqanin.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Namakua ca diqanin laqbing?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Maluhum sala, mahivhiv amin, nanitu vali’an ca laqbing.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Makua ca diqanin tudipa?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Macisit tukuc ca diqanin tudip, asa painukan is pakanata’un ca munata.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Makua ca diqanin han ulu’an?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Masaulval tanaun ca diqanin han ulu’an.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Naqudanan ca tudipin?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Namaningac ca diqanin tudipin, nitu qudanan.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Naqudanan ca tudipin?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Uu, naqudanan ca tudipin.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Qudanan haip?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Mindangza’in, mintasalin ca vali’.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Qudanan haip?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Qudananin, utu uka talulung sinadas naak.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Qudanan ca nata haip?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Ni’ang qudanan haip, utu naqudanan ca qani’anin, asa tu madas i talulung ca munata.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Namacisit sala ca katavinin tu ci’itqanin?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Uu, macisit sala ca katavinin tu ci’itqanin, pimadai’i ca huluc mainuk.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Namacaklu sala ca haip tu tanabal?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Uu, namacaklu sala ca tanabalin, pimadai’i quu ca danum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Asa asu ki maklangqanin?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Asa caak i maklangqanin, maupa’i manangqac ca diqanin.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Asa asu ki kazhavqanin?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Nii azak asa ki kazhavqanin, maupai madia sala luvluvan ca kazhavqaninin.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
